name: 20 Foot Round Steel Light Pole | 4 Inches Wide | 11 Gauge
description: Our 20 foot round steel light poles are 4 inches round and come with a removable pole cap. The 20 ft steel light pole is hot-dip galvanized and powder coated architectural bronze in color. Our 20 ft light pole uses 11 gauge steel. Round steel poles are commonly used for requirements for commercial parking lot projects. Our 20 foot steel light pole comes with a 2 3/8 Tenon. Bolt Circle range 8-10 In, bolt size 3/4x17x3 In, 2 sides of the pole shaft are predrilled and hole plugs included. POLE ACCESSORIES: 4 Piece ANCHOR BOLT SET 2 Piece BASECOVER 8 WASHERS 8 NUTS TEMPLATE (set plate) TOP COVER SIDE HAND HOLE COVE
short_desc: Key Features: Height: 20 ft Gauge: 11 Size: 4 in round Weight: 117 lbs Color: Black, Bronze Bolt Circle: 8 in – 10 in Bolt Projection: 2.75 in EPA Rating 70 mph: 12.2 EPA Rating 80 mph: 10.3 EPA Rating 90 mph: 9.0 EPA Rating 100 mph: 7.2 EPA Rating 110 mph: 6.0 EPA Rating 120 mph: 4.6 Warranty: 1 Year
